seo_title: The Well | Minimalist Wellness Retreat in Palm Springs
seo_description: Where minimalism feels like a hug. 1-bedroom wellness retreat in Palm Springs with clean lines, warm wood, teal velvet couch. Visual rest for design lovers sensitive to overwhelm. Book direct, save 15%.
tagline: Where minimalism feels like a hug.
description_heading: Walk in. Set your bag down. The space does the rest.
description_p1: The Well was designed for the person who needs a reset and doesn't want to work for it. No clutter asking for your attention. No brainwork required. Southwestern minimalism through a mid-century modern lens: Navajo pattern work, meditative line motifs, the teal velvet couch that is exactly as good as it looks.
description_p2: One bedroom, sleeps two. The kitchen is stocked for real home cooking, not just coffee and a box of cereal. A local restaurant guide doubles as a cookbook inspired by Palm Springs favorites. Smart storage keeps everything organized. Nothing added for filler. Every piece earned its place.
description_p3: The outdoor space is yours: slow mornings with coffee, a meal under the desert sky, or just sitting and letting it be quiet. The Well is a long-term rental (28-night minimum).
description_p4: Every guest of The Well leaves saying some version of the same thing: not just rested, but clear-headed, grounded, and better for having been here. That's what we built it for.
